s.name: Marth
s.subtitle: Lord · P-1 · Required; only unit who can seize and open chests; has Rapier (vs. cavalry/armor) and late-game Falchion (vs. dragons)

s.name: Ogma
s.subtitle: Mercenary · Ch. 2 · Best early base stats; can reclass to Swordmaster (crit) or Sniper

a.name: Navarre
a.subtitle: Myrmidon · Ch. 3 · Blazing speed (13 base); talk with Caeda; can reclass to Hero

a.name: Caeda
a.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · P-4 · Wing Spear vs. armor/cavalry; recruits many units via talk; can reclass to Dracoknight

a.name: Cain
a.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1 · Well-rounded all-rounder; can reclass to Dracoknight or Hero

a.name: Hardin
a.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 8 · 100% HP growth, 60% Def growth; can reclass to General or Dracoknight

a.name: Minerva
a.subtitle: Dracoknight · Ch. 10 · Outstanding pre-promote; high base Str; can reclass to Paladin or General

a.name: Linde
a.subtitle: Mage · Ch. 11 · Best magic unit; joins with Aura (vs. cavalry); can reclass to Bishop

a.name: Jeorge
a.subtitle: Sniper · Ch. 14 · Pre-promote; joins with Parthia (grants +5 Res when equipped); can reclass to Horseman

a.name: Tiki
a.subtitle: Manakete · Gaiden 19x · 100% HP growth; uses Divinestone; requires Bantu alive to recruit

b.name: Jagen
b.subtitle: Paladin · P-1 · Classic Jagen archetype; strong early mounted utility; low growths, fades mid-game

b.name: Abel
b.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1 · More defensive than Cain; can reclass to Dracoknight

b.name: Merric
b.subtitle: Mage · Ch. 5 · Only mage for several early chapters; joins with Excalibur (vs. fliers); can reclass to Bishop

b.name: Draug
b.subtitle: Armor Knight · Ch. 1 · Best armor unit; terrible speed — reclass to Paladin to fix mobility

b.name: Gordin
b.subtitle: Archer · P-2 · Low speed (5 base) — strongly recommend reclassing to Horseman for mobility

b.name: Palla
b.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 10 · Joins with Minerva; reliable flier; can reclass to Dracoknight

b.name: Catria
b.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 10 · Better speed growth than Palla (55%); can reclass to Dracoknight

b.name: Wendell
b.subtitle: Sage · Gaiden 7x · Already promoted; low growths but usable immediately; can reclass to Bishop

b.name: Xane
b.subtitle: Chameleon · Gaiden 19x · Copies any ally's class and stats each turn; unique and versatile filler

b.name: Astram
b.subtitle: Hero · Gaiden 16x · Solid base stats, reliable fighter; worth rescuing from Gaiden 16x

c.name: Bantu
c.subtitle: Manakete · Ch. 6 · Terrible growths — keep alive solely to recruit Tiki in Gaiden 19x; never invest EXP

c.name: Julian
c.subtitle: Thief · Ch. 3 · Only unit that can open chests and doors; never let him die; can reclass to Assassin

c.name: Maria
c.subtitle: Bishop · Ch. 10 · Rescue her to unlock Minerva; decent healer but outclassed by Linde

c.name: Midia
c.subtitle: Paladin · Gaiden 16x · Solid mounted unit; late join via Gaiden 16x rescue

d.name: Wrys
d.subtitle: Cleric · P-3 · Weakest healer; recruit and sacrifice to unlock Gaidens

d.name: Castor
d.subtitle: Hunter · Ch. 3 · Mediocre; talk with Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Dolph
d.subtitle: Armor Knight · Ch. 4 · Weak armor; talk with Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Macellan
d.subtitle: Armor Knight · Ch. 4 · Weak armor; talk with Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Roger
d.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 5 · Mediocre; talk with Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Matthis
d.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 5 · Lena's brother; talk with Lena or Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Lorenz
d.subtitle: General · Ch. 14 · Old and slow; talk with Caeda; recruit only for unit-count management

d.name: Frey
d.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1/Ch. 18 · Sacrifice in P-1; returns in Ch. 18 severely underleveled
